requires_subpages.reason: Content is rendered dynamically via JavaScript on the single anslagstavla page. The actual notice list is not visible in static HTML and must be scraped after JS execution.

notes: Page uses Sitevision CMS. Main content area is #svid94_3b981bf917a75bbaf406e479 / #page_content but the actual notice list is injected by JavaScript after page load. A headless browser (Playwright/Puppeteer) is required. Wait for dynamic content to render before extracting notices. The page title confirms this is the correct digital anslagstavla per kommunallagen.
